title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video demonstrates building a complete event management system with role-based access control, permissions, workflows, and automations using Softr's AI Co-Builder feature without re-prompting. The video contrasts Softr with alternatives like Lovable and Replit, highlighting cost savings from reduced AI API usage during app development.
